seoTitle: Jones Island vs Judds Creek — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Jones Island and Judds Creek. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Jones Island vs Judds Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jones Island and Judds Creek.
heading: Jones Island vs Judds Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jones Island, New South Wales and Judds Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jones Island has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Judds Creek (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jones Island or Judds Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jones Island has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Judds Creek scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jones Island scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Judds Creek scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jones Island or Judds Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jones Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.17% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
